home.heroTitle:
Come in from the dark.
The observatory is open.
home.newsletterDescription: Monthly transmissions on poetry, photography, AI research, and the quiet art of paying attention.
home.newsletterFootnote: Powered by Substack · Also available on Medium

poetry.title: Poetry
poetry.subtitle: Verses born from observing the world
poetry.description: Explore the poetry collection from The Observatory.
poetry.heroDescription: Poetry at the intersection of silence, technology, and longing. Written in English and Romanian, read aloud when the words demand it.
poetry.heroQuote: What is essential is invisible to the eye.
poetry.quoteText: Poetry is the language in which man explores his own amazement.

photography.title: Photography
photography.subtitle: Light captured in frames
photography.heroDescription: Photographs that listen. Studies in fog, urban silence, and the negative space between presence and absence. Shot on film and digital across Romania, Austria, and the quiet corners of attention.
photography.galleryNote: Click any image to open lightbox view · Full series descriptions available for members

music.title: Music
music.subtitle: Sounds and compositions from The Observatory
music.heroDescription: Original compositions at the intersection of ambient electronics, spoken word poetry, and the sounds of silence. Music made in the Observatory, for the Observatory.
music.albumDescription: Seven compositions at the border between ambient electronics and spoken word poetry. Recorded during late-night sessions at the Observatory, each track maps a different silence.

essays.title: Essays
essays.subtitle: In-depth reflections and analyses
essays.heroDescription: Long-form essays, reflections, and field notes on AI, language, art, and the spaces in between — dispatches from asteroid B612.
essays.newsletterDescription: Subscribe to receive new essays directly.
essays.newsletterFootnote: Powered by Substack  ·  RSS feed available

membership.title: Membership
membership.subtitle: Join The Observatory community
membership.heroTitle:
Choose how deep
you want to look.
membership.heroDescription:
From published work to private drafts. From abstracts to full research.
Every tier unlocks a deeper layer of the observatory.

"One sees clearly only with the heart."
membership.donationDescription: You can still support this work with a one-time donation. Every contribution helps keep the Observatory open.
membership.quoteText: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
membership.patronDescription: Full access to all poetry, essays, research papers, music, and photography. Plus early access to new releases and a 10% discount at The Scriptorium.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The story behind The Observatory
about.bio1: Poet, photographer, and machine learning researcher exploring the boundaries where language meets computation. Based in Bucharest, I work at the intersection of art and artificial intelligence -- writing verse that maps the silence between data points, capturing photographs of the unseen, and publishing research on neural architectures and the poetics of attention.
about.bio2: The Observatory is my creative home -- a place for quiet observation, deep reading, and the kind of thinking that requires darkness to see clearly. Here you will find poetry in two languages, photography that listens more than it looks, music composed in the hours between midnight and dawn, and research that asks what happens when machines learn to pay attention.
about.personalQuote: I write to find out what I didn't know I knew. I photograph to remember what I haven't seen yet.
about.supportDescription: If this work resonates, consider becoming a patron or making a one-time contribution.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Send us a message
contact.heroDescription: For collaborations, readings, academic inquiries, or just to say hello. I read every message and respond when the stars align.

legal.label: Legal
legal.termsSection1Body: All content on The Observatory -- including but not limited to poetry, essays, photographs, music, research papers, and visual designs -- is the intellectual property of Mihai Gavrilescu unless otherwise stated. Reproduction, distribution, or modification of any content without prior written consent is strictly prohibited.
legal.termsSection2Body: Membership subscriptions are billed monthly through Stripe. You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Refunds are not provided for partial months. Access to gated content is contingent upon an active subscription at the appropriate tier.
legal.termsSection3Body: All purchases made through The Scriptorium (shop) are final unless the item arrives damaged or defective. Digital products are non-refundable once delivered. Physical products ship within 5-7 business days. Shipping within the EU is free for orders over €25. International shipping rates apply for orders outside the EU.
legal.termsSection4Body: By subscribing to our newsletter, you consent to receiving periodic emails about new content, events, and updates from The Observatory. You may unsubscribe at any time using the link provided in each email. We do not share your email address with third parties.
legal.termsSection5Body: Users of The Observatory are expected to engage respectfully with the content and community. Harassment, hate speech, spam, or any behavior that disrupts the quiet atmosphere of this space will result in immediate account suspension. We reserve the right to remove any user without prior notice.
legal.termsSection6Body: The Observatory is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of this website, including but not limited to direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Content is provided for informational and artistic purposes only.
legal.termsSection7Body: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Romania. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Bucharest, Romania. If any provision of these terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
legal.privacySection1Body: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when creating an account, subscribing to our newsletter, or making a purchase. This includes your name, email address, and billing information. We also automatically collect certain technical data such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited.
legal.privacySection2Body: Your personal information is used to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send newsletters and updates, and communicate with you about your account. We use analytics data to understand how visitors interact with The Observatory and to improve the user experience.
legal.privacySection3Body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience. Essential cookies are required for the site to function properly. Analytics cookies help us understand usage patterns. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. See our Cookie Policy for more details.
legal.privacySection4Body: Your data is stored securely on servers provided by Supabase (PostgreSQL) and processed through Stripe for payment transactions. We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit and at rest. We retain your data only for as long as necessary to provide our services.
legal.privacySection5Body: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, or delete your personal data. You may also request data portability or restrict processing. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@observatory.ro. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
legal.privacySection6Body: We use the following third-party services that may process your data: Stripe (payments), Supabase (database), Vercel (hosting), Resend (email delivery), Substack (newsletter), and Cloudinary (media storage). Each of these services has its own privacy policy governing data handling.
legal.privacySection7Body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@observatory.ro or by mail at The Observatory, Bucharest, Romania. For GDPR-related inquiries, our Data Protection Officer can be reached at the same address.
legal.cookiesSection1Body: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide a better user experience, and supply information to site owners. The Observatory uses cookies to remember your preferences and understand how you interact with our content.
legal.cookiesSection2Body: Essential cookies: Required for the website to function properly. These include session cookies for authentication and security tokens. Analytics cookies: Help us understand how visitors use The Observatory, which pages are most popular, and how users navigate the site. Preference cookies: Remember your settings such as language preference (Romanian/English) and theme selection.
legal.cookiesSection3Body: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages. These include embedded Spotify players, Stripe payment forms, and analytics providers. We do not control these cookies and recommend reviewing the respective privacy policies of these services for more information.
legal.cookiesSection4Body: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse or delete cookies. Please note that disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of The Observatory, including the ability to log in, maintain your session, and access gated content.
legal.cookiesSection5Body: Session cookies are deleted when you close your browser. Persistent cookies remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them. Authentication cookies expire after 30 days. Analytics cookies are retained for up to 12 months. Preference cookies are retained for up to 12 months.
legal.cookiesSection6Body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the updated policy on this page with a revised "last updated" date.
legal.cookiesSection7Body: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at privacy@observatory.ro or by mail at The Observatory, Bucharest, Romania.
